summary: Close‑to‑board audience recording captures a lively Spring‑1984 general admission show with solid sound.
review: The tape was taken right behind the sound board at the War Memorial, giving it a clear and present feel despite being an audience source. Reviewers recall a great time and high energy from this 1984 spring concert, though no specific songs or performance details are mentioned.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one moderately detailed review; positive remarks about both the recording proximity and overall enjoyment suggest a good show with decent audio quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Recorded right behind the sound board, providing clear presence; no complaints about muddiness or drop‑outs.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewer mentions a great overall vibe and high energy typical of a general admission War Memorial show, but gives no specific song or set commentary.
